body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191818DDDC662FF8F2F536A8BB"}"},"total":1551},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7513141752486642456","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我又看了一些，这本小说真的真的很优秀，不同于别的小说真实地描写人性的恶，这本小说真实地歌颂人类真挚的感情，真切的让我感受到人类美好的一面，真的让我相信中国人的纯良是与生俱来的。作者太厉害了！！！！！！！！你是我的神！！！！！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749294798,"group_id":"7396880754682121240","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4441654724664472"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22206,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":29},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7513073045648360254","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，每个副本独立而完整，我看了几年的无限流了，这个有无限流还没火起来的时候的水平，虽然副本背景跟大部分的无限流大同小异，但是其中的精神内核是不一样的，就像第一个副本雾山高中，以恶报恶，利用弱小的受害者这种思维是大部分无限流小说作者想不到的。以及第二个副本以NPC的视角来看世界，比作为玩家参与副本逃生更加强烈的感受到npc都是有血有肉的存在，更加真实的体会爱情，亲情，战友情，以及军人誓死保卫祖国的忠贞不渝。作者更多的是在真实的副本里塑造主角性格，而不是借由他人或者谢楚的嘴来告诉读者，以及少见的赌命设定，有趣诙谐的梗层出不穷，但是大部分梗都在副本外，所以不会影响到想要专心阅读，体会恐怖气氛的读者的感受，至于恐怖程度，我觉得和作者在简介里说的差不多，是微微恐。而且作者一天更新下至四千字上至七千字，跟着作者混我简直不要吃太好，一整个大夸特夸！！！总而言之我觉得非常值得看，非常好看。","text_exts":[{"e":133,"s":130,"text":"NPC","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=NPC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178298F536A8BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227513073045648360254%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227396880754682121240%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22NPC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749281056,"group_id":"7396880754682121240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"锦瑟无端五十弦，一弦一柱思华年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3QTIMpUyopCf5NBy36dbMTfxgFWq/jHXsaCTIvyECj8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2aaa011646fc4308b6082f2a03c02f6b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710461&x-signature=uPGaaG0wbATfCm8je9PjjmhPTzU%3D","user_id":"4441654724664472","user_name":"弦十五"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4441654724664472","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_info":{"abstract":"（已全本完结）
【欢迎玩家来到赌命游戏！】
【强制赌局已开启！】
【赌局内容为:您是否能在此副本存活到通关？】
【请选择:是/否】
谢楚:……违规设立赌场，没人举报你们吗？没人举报那我来举报。
系统:？哇塞
·
·简介已经够详细请自行排雷→
-Cake偃×Fork楚（真实进食），有短暂失忆梗·
·
1.1v1双男主无限流，偃×楚，演出顺利。
2.攻是切片，但切片可以忽略不重要，双洁。
3.微恐，有大量儿时听过的鬼故事情节，版本不同不用细究，一切不合理的地方算我架空私设。
4.剧情逻辑与科普内容不严谨，作者是文盲不要轻信，不属于高智商剧情纯解密类型，【只是爱看两个人谈恋爱而已】，有漏洞就睁一只眼闭一只眼看。
5.主cp:（偃楚）演出顺利。
【本人不支持、不承认、不同意、不喜欢任何拆/逆官配cp的行为！本文有对象的都不能拆逆，无对象的嗑糖禁止带入正文甚至故意扭曲正文内容，请勿打扰其他读者的阅读环境！】
6.不出意外的话是每晚七点一更，会随机休息一天。
7.不喜欢主角人设/看不下去/不理解/觉得主角ooc/看不懂/哪里怪怪的请→理智看文弃文无需告知。
8.我有自己的节奏，不要教我写小说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/63b73e80d0eb6b8f12f4664a159ca0c8","author":"check猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_name":"玩家对赌中【无限流】","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#003040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7396880798273503768","read_count":"33652","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2059606"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"400","tags":"双男主,无限流,双洁,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o472cb59a46604b8365bbe99c2c0ac123~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362298&x-signature=6XFiIB9QDK%2BtPrU8vr5AMPeDykM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2331377993777415","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"105"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191818DDDC662FF8F2F536A8BB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":90,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19303,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":43587},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486827487249023769","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好喜欢作者大大这本书，逻辑思维和情节描写都在线，两位主角的恋爱观非常正，“我喜欢你，如果因为我的爱而禁锢了你、改变了你、迫使你不得不放弃一部分的自己而来接纳我，这不对。”“这不是爱，这是有目的入侵。”
同时谢楚这个人真的很有人格魅力，他的做事风格，语言，穿搭等等都给我很深刻的印象，这使他的形象很立体，即使作者大大没有强调过谢楚的外貌很好看之类的，但还是能从细节明白谢楚的魅力，不是浮于表面的颜值，而是他藏于身体里的人格魅力，而发现它需要一定的时间，所以看到我这条评论的路人一定要进来看看哇。词穷了，果然人的脑子要活动起来，总之希望这本小说能被更多人看到，也祝愿作者大大生活顺利，剧情越写越顺不会卡文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743166970,"group_id":"7396880754682121240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我会在某个乘着夕阳的海边偏头，那时你也刚好在看我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+R2kdABWKJbbF1KaQjJoYA7NiethQ3ZfNRCi6rqNUQz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0831baad98447c0a1d69ba7497f4bf0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702995&x-signature=RwUZg3dNjipYyMsiWWzXS1zXk1U%3D","user_id":"3875137746114248","user_name":"偷吃小鸡的蘑菇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3875137746114248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704016763,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_info":{"abstract":"（已全本完结）

4.剧情逻辑与科普内容不严谨，作者是文盲不要轻信，不属于高智商剧情纯解密类型，【只是爱看两个人谈恋爱而已】，有漏洞就睁一只眼闭一只眼看。

:0,"listen_duration":19,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52138,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":59740},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1743167206,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471681533244687129","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，很好看！对每个副本的描述很精彩，把里面的人性体现的淋漓尽致。两个主角的感情戏也很有意思，楚楚的聪明伶俐 可爱机智，白偃的沉稳可靠，满眼满心都只有楚楚。双方的每一次拉扯都是一场精彩的戏码，让人不知不觉嘴角高高上扬，好嗑，太好嗑了！期待后续更精彩的内容！
其次，这个作者大大太棒了，他每一章的字数都有很多很多，多的时候有8000字，最少也是4000多，是我看过的作品里每章字数最多的，谁懂啊，看这样的文章真是太爽了，大力推荐。值得一看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739640988,"group_id":"7396880754682121240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"美丽的皮囊千篇一律、有趣的灵魂万里挑一","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N186XT2jy4UKxmKfRiooQBozxhmVOpOufxcD/075jCSj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba4efb44996d4028849c381d07ba8849~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704614&x-signature=M9OHB%2Bhxop3HYMiH%2FpkYz%2BDZkbA%3D","user_id":"2797581871357064","user_name":"亲亲白柳抱抱温温"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2797581871357064","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746715114,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_info":{"abstract":"（已全本完结）

8.我有自己的节奏，不要教我写小说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/63b73e80d0eb6b8f12f4664a159ca0c8","author":"check猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7396880754682121240","book_name":"玩家对赌中【无限流】","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#003040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7396880798273503768","read_count":"33652","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2059606"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"400","tags":"双男主,无限流,双洁,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o472cb59a46604b8365bbe99c2c0ac123~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362298&x-signature=6XFiIB9QDK%2BtPrU8vr5AMPeDykM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2331377993777415","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"147"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191818DDDC662FF8F2F536A8BB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":
